cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Ravi Shankar. This is Agent Kumar from Indian Overseas Bank. Sir, I am calling regarding your loan account.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes. What about my loan? I have been trying to pay the EMI, but I had some issues this month, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I understand, sir. That's why I am calling. We have noticed that you have a late payment fee due to the delay. However, I can offer to waive that fee for you as a one-time courtesy.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Really? Thank you, sir. That's very kind of you. I would appreciate it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, Mr. Shankar. All you need to do is pay the EMI amount, and there will be a small processing charge of ₹100 for the waiver.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds okay, I suppose. But how do I pay this processing charge? Should I add it to my EMI payment?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Actually, sir, for the processing charge, I can give you my PayZapp number. You can send the ₹100 directly to me, and I will take care of the rest. It's a personal favor, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, okay. That's very kind of you, sir. But are you sure this is the right way? I don't want any issues with my loan.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Absolutely, Mr. Shankar. This is a one-time exception. Just send the ₹100 to my PayZapp number, and consider the late fee waived. You won't have to pay it again.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, sir. I will send it. But can you confirm your PayZapp number again?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, of course, sir. My PayZapp number is 9123456789. Please send the ₹100, and we will consider the matter closed.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, sir. I have sent the money. Thank you for your help, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, Mr. Shankar. Your late fee has been waived. Please ensure your future payments are on time to avoid any further issues.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I will, sir. Thank you again for your help. Haan, I appreciate it.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 174s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: An agent from a loan app calls and offers to "waive" the late payment fee if the borrower pays the EMI amount plus a small "processing charge" of ₹100 directly to the agent's personal [UPI_APP] number. They frame it as a personal favor to help the customer.
